case.title: SMITH v. U S SHIPPING BOARD EMERGENCY FLEET CORPORATION

opinion.h4: SMITH v. U S SHIPPING BOARD EMERGENCY FLEET CORPORATION, (1927)
opinion.h2: Jacob Telfair SMITH, petitioner, v. UNITED STATES SHIPPING BOARD EMERGENCY FLEET CORPORATION;
CATZ AMERICAN SHIPPING COMPANY, Inc., petitioner, v. UNITED STATES SHIPPING BOARD EMERGENCY ELEET CORPORATION. *
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. John C. Prizer, of New York City, for petitioners.
Messrs. William D. Mitchell, Sol. Gen., George R. Farnum, Asst. Atty. Gen., and J. Frank Staley, of Washington, D. C., for respondent.
Petition for writs of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Second Circuit denied.
* This application for certiorari was on permission of the Court of Appeals in which the case was still pending and undetermined.[ Smith v. U S Shipping Board Emergency Fleet Corporation (1927) ]
